phase3_findings.description: G1: iter-1 stale-value scan used grep -cF (line count); a same-line stale duplicate evades it. Both mirrors carry the phrase on one physical line.
G2: stale-value scan covered only 2 of 4 mirrors; the budget doc's decision-record prose/cell remained presence-only.

fix_decisions.evidence: bold-prose shape count-scanned (unique to shipped-default); table-cell shape shared with AC2 8,500 so left to the positional AC3 pin — a written carve-out, not a silent skip

notes: Iter-2 findings were all about iter-1's own fix (variance recovery). comment-analyzer + requesting-code-review verified the coupling claim TRUE and found no documented_falsehood. G1 fixed via occurrence-counting; G2 partially via the bold-prose scan with a documented table-cell carve-out.
